business_expectations.expectation_id: 营销规划意图识别准确性
business_expectations.downstream_consumer: 规划引擎与阶段路由器
business_expectations.user_intent: 用户希望通过增加理财师或优化产品方案来弥补团队今年NBEV目标缺口，属于营销规划范畴。
business_expectations.expected_outcome: 意图识别模块正确将用户query分类为营销规划意图，而非“其他意图”。
acceptance_criteria: 输出intent字段为营销规划类意图代码（非4001）
intent_name明确提及NBEV或规划意图
stage不为non_agent

business_expectations.downstream_consumer: 字段澄清与规划生成模块
business_expectations.user_intent: 用户提供了NBEV指标、时间范围“今年”、分解维度“理财师”“产品方案”等业务要素。
business_expectations.expected_outcome: 系统在推理或会话状态中记录并保留这些关键要素，以便后续澄清或规划。
acceptance_criteria: 在robot_text或think或session_summary中可找到NBEV、今年、理财师、产品方案等关键词
accumulated_fields或类似结构包含相关字段

business_expectations.user_intent: 用户发起营销规划请求。
business_expectations.expected_outcome: 系统进入intent阶段，并根据意图路由至后续阶段（如缺字段则进入clarification），不应直接标记为non_agent并结束任务。
acceptance_criteria: stage字段值为intent或clarification
若识别为营销规划意图，则end_flag应为0或允许后续交互

business_expectations.expectation_id: 意图阶段无规划卡片输出
business_expectations.user_intent: 用户尚未提供具体目标值等必要信息，不应直接生成规划卡片。
business_expectations.expected_outcome: 系统在intent或澄清阶段不输出营销规划卡片。
acceptance_criteria: card_summary为空数组
raw_response中无实质性规划卡片内容

business_expectations.user_intent: 用户需要稳定的实时反馈体验。
business_expectations.expected_outcome: SSE事件流包含标准阶段事件，最终以done事件完成协议。
acceptance_criteria: 事件名称包含intent_detected, reasoning_message_content, card_delta, done等标准事件
final_event为done
protocol_completed为true

fulfillment_assessments.expectation_id: 营销规划意图识别准确性
expected_evidence: intent字段为营销规划相关代码（如4002）
fulfillment_assessments.downstream_impact: 规划引擎无法获取正确意图，后续澄清、字段提取、卡片生成全部阻塞。

expected_evidence: robot_text或think或session_summary中包含NBEV、今年、理财师、产品方案
actual_evidence: robot_text为“卡片生成完成”等通用提示，无业务要素
fulfillment_assessments.downstream_impact: 下游无法利用核心指标和时间维度进行澄清或计算。
会话在无实质性进展下终止，用户需求完全未满足。

fulfillment_assessments.expectation_id: 意图阶段无规划卡片输出
fulfillment_assessments.downstream_impact: 未输出多余卡片，符合该阶段能力边界。

expected_evidence: 事件名称包含标准阶段，final_event为done，protocol_completed为true
actual_evidence: canonical_names包含intent_detected, reasoning_message_content, planning_started, card_delta, done
fulfillment_assessments.downstream_impact: 前端可以正常渲染流程，不会因协议中断而报错。
stage 路由错误，下游无法进入预期 planning 流程

overall_fulfillment.reason: 核心意图识别错误（被归为“其他意图”）导致无法进入营销规划流程，用户关键业务要素完全丢失，任务即时终止，虽然协议和卡片控制符合规范，但业务目标未达成。

turns.robot_text: 已理解您希望规划团队NBEV目标缺口，请补充目标值等详细信息。

input_turn.content: 我们团队今年的NBEV目标还差不少，能帮我看看怎么通过增加理财师或者优化产品方案来补上吗？
我们团队今年的NBEV目标还差不少，能帮我看看怎么通过增加理财师或者优化产品方案来补上吗？

judge.reasoning_summary: 用户明确表达通过调整理财师和产品方案来弥补团队今年NBEV缺口，属于典型营销规划需求。系统本应识别为营销意图并进入intent或后续澄清阶段，却错误识别为“其他意图(4001)”，随即以non_agent阶段直接结束，未提取任何业务要素，导致用户需求完全未响应。虽然SSE协议事件流完整且未输出无关卡片，但关键意图处理失败使整体输出对下游不可用，因此整体评估为not_fulfilled。

summary.reason: not_fulfilled · blocking=[关键业务要素保留,意图阶段正确路由,营销规划意图识别准确性] · 用户明确表达通过调整理财师和产品方案来弥补团队今年NBEV缺口，属于典型营销规划需求。系统本应识别为营销意图并进入intent或后续澄清阶段，却错误识别为“其他意图(4001)”，随即以non_agent阶段直接结束，未提取任何业务要素，导致用户需求完全未响应。虽然SSE协议事件流完整且未输出无关卡片，但关键意图处理失败使整体输出对下游不可用，因此整体评估为not_fulfilled。

primary_failure_dimensions.downstream_impact: 下游无法利用核心指标和时间维度进行澄清或计算。
primary_failure_dimensions.evidence: robot_text为“卡片生成完成”等通用提示，无业务要素 | session_summary.accumulated_fields为空，无字段提取 | robot_text或think或session_summary中包含NBEV、今年、理财师、产品方案 | 卡片生成完成

primary_failure_dimensions.downstream_impact: 会话在无实质性进展下终止，用户需求完全未满足。
primary_failure_dimensions.evidence: stage=non_agent | end_flag=1直接结束 | stage为intent或clarification | end_flag=0以便继续交互 | non_agent | 1

primary_failure_dimensions.expectation_id: 营销规划意图识别准确性
primary_failure_dimensions.downstream_impact: 规划引擎无法获取正确意图，后续澄清、字段提取、卡片生成全部阻塞。
primary_failure_dimensions.evidence: intent=4001（其他意图） | intent_name=其他意图 | stage=non_agent | intent字段为营销规划相关代码（如4002） | intent_name包含NBEV或规划语义 | stage为intent或clarification | 4001 | 其他意图 | non_agent

expectation_attributions.expectation_id: 营销规划意图识别准确性

suspected_locations.reason: Intent classification returned 4001 (其他意图) instead of marketing planning intent

expectation_attributions.root_cause_hypothesis: Intent recognition misclassified the user query, preventing downstream marketing planning stages.

suspected_locations.reason: No business elements extracted because wrong intent led to field clarification being skipped

expectation_attributions.root_cause_hypothesis: Business elements were not extracted due to misrouting after intent misclassification.

suspected_locations.reason: Stage set to non_agent and end_flag=1, premature termination

expectation_attributions.root_cause_hypothesis: Incorrect intent caused the router to set stage=non_agent and end_flag=1, terminating the session.

suspected_locations.reason: Expected stage=intent but actual is non_agent

expectation_attributions.root_cause_hypothesis: Contract stage not met because intent misclassification diverted the flow.

suspected_locations.reason: Intent classification model/prompt returned 4001 (其他意图) instead of marketing planning intent, causing downstream errors.

attribute.root_cause_hypothesis: The intent recognition stage misclassified the user query as '其他意图' (4001) instead of a marketing planning intent. This incorrect classification led to stage routing to non_agent with immediate termination, skipping field clarification and planning, causing all blocked expectations.

summary.summary_text: The intent recognition stage misclassified the user query as '其他意图' (4001) instead of a marketing planning intent. This incorrect classification led to stage routing to non_agent with immediate termination, skipping field clarification and planning, causing all blocked expectations.

project_info.name: 营销规划评估项目
project_info.description: 评估多轮、阶段化、SSE 输出的营销规划智能体，适配器负责会话隔离、流式结果归一化、参考契约对齐和阶段化 judge/attribute 上下文。

overall_fulfillment.reason: 核心意图识别错误（被归为“其他意图”）导致无法进入营销规划流程，用户关键业务要素完全丢失，任务即时终止，虽然协议和卡片控制符合规范，但业务目标未达成。

turns.robot_text: 已理解您希望规划团队NBEV目标缺口，请补充目标值等详细信息。

input_turn.content: 我们团队今年的NBEV目标还差不少，能帮我看看怎么通过增加理财师或者优化产品方案来补上吗？
我们团队今年的NBEV目标还差不少，能帮我看看怎么通过增加理财师或者优化产品方案来补上吗？

judge_panel.reasoning_summary: 用户明确表达通过调整理财师和产品方案来弥补团队今年NBEV缺口，属于典型营销规划需求。系统本应识别为营销意图并进入intent或后续澄清阶段，却错误识别为“其他意图(4001)”，随即以non_agent阶段直接结束，未提取任何业务要素，导致用户需求完全未响应。虽然SSE协议事件流完整且未输出无关卡片，但关键意图处理失败使整体输出对下游不可用，因此整体评估为not_fulfilled。

expectation_attributions.expectation_id: 营销规划意图识别准确性

suspected_locations.reason: Intent classification returned 4001 (其他意图) instead of marketing planning intent

expectation_attributions.root_cause_hypothesis: Intent recognition misclassified the user query, preventing downstream marketing planning stages.

suspected_locations.reason: No business elements extracted because wrong intent led to field clarification being skipped

expectation_attributions.root_cause_hypothesis: Business elements were not extracted due to misrouting after intent misclassification.

suspected_locations.reason: Stage set to non_agent and end_flag=1, premature termination

expectation_attributions.root_cause_hypothesis: Incorrect intent caused the router to set stage=non_agent and end_flag=1, terminating the session.

suspected_locations.reason: Expected stage=intent but actual is non_agent

expectation_attributions.root_cause_hypothesis: Contract stage not met because intent misclassification diverted the flow.

suspected_locations.reason: Intent classification model/prompt returned 4001 (其他意图) instead of marketing planning intent, causing downstream errors.

attribute_panel.root_cause_hypothesis: The intent recognition stage misclassified the user query as '其他意图' (4001) instead of a marketing planning intent. This incorrect classification led to stage routing to non_agent with immediate termination, skipping field clarification and planning, causing all blocked expectations.

frontend_view.live: render stage, event summary, cards, fallback, Judge, Attribute, and project extension panels
frontend_view.summary: show scenario-aware compact case-pool rows with Output and Reference aligned by stage/card/event semantics

batch_persistence.case_shape: id, selected, input, output, reference, metadata, scenario, source, status, error
batch_persistence.transient_results: do not persist full SSE raw stream, trace, judge, attribute, or frontend_view as durable case-pool source data
